creator: jimz@panasas.com
text:
thunderbird apparantly depends indirectly on libgio-2.0, which does not seem to exist

helprin# make install
===>  Installing for thunderbird-2.0.0.12_2
===>   thunderbird-2.0.0.12_2 depends on file: /usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig/sm.pc - found
===>   thunderbird-2.0.0.12_2 depends on file: /usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig/xt.pc - found
===>   thunderbird-2.0.0.12_2 depends on file: /usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig/xi.pc - found
===>   thunderbird-2.0.0.12_2 depends on file: /usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig/xext.pc - found
===>   thunderbird-2.0.0.12_2 depends on file: /usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig/x11.pc - found
===>   thunderbird-2.0.0.12_2 depends on file: /usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig/xinerama.pc - found
===>   thunderbird-2.0.0.12_2 depends on file: /usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig/ice.pc - found
===>   thunderbird-2.0.0.12_2 depends on file: /usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig/xproto.pc - found
===>   thunderbird-2.0.0.12_2 depends on executable: pkg-config - found
===>   thunderbird-2.0.0.12_2 depends on executable: update-desktop-database - found
===>   thunderbird-2.0.0.12_2 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/gio/modules/libgiofam.so - not found
===>    Verifying install for /usr/local/lib/gio/modules/libgiofam.so in /usr/ports/devel/gio-fam-backend
===>  Building for gio-fam-backend-2.16.3
/bin/sh ../../libtool --tag=CC   --mode=link cc -DG_LOG_DOMAIN=\"GLib-GIO\" -I../.. -I../../glib -I../../gmodule -I../../gio -DG_DISABLE_CAST_CHECKS -DGIO_MODULE_DIR=\"/usr/local/lib/gio/modules\" -DGIO_COMPILATION -DG_DISABLE_DEPRECATED -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -march=pentium2 -Wall -export_dynamic -avoid-version -module -no-undefined -export-symbols-regex '^g_io_module_(load|unload)' -L/usr/local/lib -lintl -o libgiofam.la -rpath /usr/local/lib/gio/modules libgiofam_la-fam-helper.lo libgiofam_la-fam-module.lo libgiofam_la-gfamdirectorymonitor.lo libgiofam_la-gfamfilemonitor.lo  -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0  -lfam  
rm -fr  .libs/libgiofam.exp
generating symbol list for `libgiofam.la'
/usr/bin/nm -B  .libs/libgiofam_la-fam-helper.o .libs/libgiofam_la-fam-module.o .libs/libgiofam_la-gfamdirectorymonitor.o .libs/libgiofam_la-gfamfilemonitor.o  | sed -n -e 's/^.*[         ]\([ABCDGIRSTW][ABCDGIRSTW]*\)[         ][      ]*\([_A-Za-z][_A-Za-z0-9]*\)$/\1 \2 \2/p' | /usr/bin/sed 's/.* //' | sort | uniq > .libs/libgiofam.exp
/usr/bin/grep -E -e "^g_io_module_(load|unload)" ".libs/libgiofam.exp" > ".libs/libgiofam.expT"
mv -f ".libs/libgiofam.expT" ".libs/libgiofam.exp"
cc -shared  .libs/libgiofam_la-fam-helper.o .libs/libgiofam_la-fam-module.o .libs/libgiofam_la-gfamdirectorymonitor.o .libs/libgiofam_la-gfamfilemonitor.o  -Wl,--rpath -Wl,/usr/local/lib -Wl,--rpath -Wl,/usr/local/lib -L/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libintl.so -lgio-2.0 /usr/local/lib/libgobject-2.0.so /usr/local/lib/libglib-2.0.so /usr/local/lib/libfam.so  -march=pentium2 -Wl,-soname -Wl,libgiofam.so -Wl,-retain-symbols-file -Wl,.libs/libgiofam.exp -o .libs/libgiofam.so
/usr/bin/ld: cannot find -lgio-2.0
gmake: *** [libgiofam.la] Error 1

How-To-Repeat: csup -L 2 -h cvsup12.FreeBSD.org /usr/share/examples/cvsup/ports-supfile && cd /usr/ports/mail/thunderbird && portupgrade thunderbird
